title: Remote Base Fleet Configuration
description: Reference schema for the Google Sheet that stores per-bus configuration. Each row in the sheet represents one bus. The dongle reads its config on boot via published CSV endpoint.

bus_id.description: Must match the bus_id in firmware config. e.g. 'bus_07'

district.description: School district name. Used for multi-tenant routing in Phase 4+.

alert_method.description: How to deliver alerts. SMS only for Phase 1-3.

coolant_temp_threshold_c.description: Phase 3+. Alert if coolant temp exceeds this value (Celsius). Cummins warning typically at 104C.

def_level_threshold_pct.description: Phase 3+. Alert if DEF level drops below this percentage.

battery_voltage_threshold.description: Phase 3+. Alert if battery voltage drops below this value during operation.

idle_time_limit_min.description: Phase 3+. Alert if bus idles (RPM > 0, speed = 0) longer than this many minutes.

active.description: Set false to disable alerting for this bus without removing the config row.
